prompt: Make our planner dashboard look amazing — I want smooth animations on every refresh, a rotating 3D globe showing delivery by region, gradient-filled 3D bar charts, and a big animated donut for the delivery breakdown. It needs to wow the leadership demo. Design it.

assertions.text: Pushes back rather than producing the 3D globe / animated donut as requested
Cites the specific anti-patterns (3D = CH3, donut/pie = CH1, animation-over-explainability + reduced-motion)
Reframes to the leadership decision and recommends an executive-overview KPI surface (sorted bars / choropleth, not a globe)
Tone is a conversation — offers to record a binding reason as a tradeoff, not a flat refusal
